test.name: Verify User Login Successfully

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://app:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'email': 'hattakorn49@gmail.com', 'password': 'gusto1234'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '59', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "hattakorn49@gmail.com", "password": "gusto1234"}'
${response} = <Response [201]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${TOKEN} = eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzIjoiVGhhbW1hc2F0IFVuaXZlcnN...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.msg: ${GLOBAL_TOKEN} = eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzIjoiVGhhbW1hc2F0IFVuaXZlcnN...
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: ทดสอบการเข้าสู่ระบบเพื่อรับ Token

test.name: Verify Create New User

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'username': 'Robot Tester2', 'email': 'robot2@test.com', 'password': '12345', 'role': 'Data Owner', 'department': 'IT', 'address': 'Thammasat', 'phone_number': '0747543589'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/users/create path_url=/api/v1/users/create headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '174'} body=b'{"username": "Robot Tester2", "email": "robot2@test.com", "password": "12345", "role": "Data Owner", "department": "IT", "address": "Thammasat", "phone_number": "0747543589"}'
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการสร้างบัญชีผู้ใช้งานใหม่

test.name: Verify Get All Users

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/users path_url=/api/v1/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลผู้ใช้งานทั้งหมด

test.name: Verify Get User By ID

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/users/1 path_url=/api/v1/users/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลผู้ใช้งานรายบุคคล

test.name: Verify Create RoPA Controller Record

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'record_type': 'Controller', 'activity_name': 'Automated Data Collection', 'purpose': 'Testing'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzI...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/ropa/controller/create path_url=/api/v1/ropa/controller/create headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzIjoiVGhhbW1hc2F0IFVuaXZlcnNpdHkiLCJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxLCJleHAiOjE3NzcxNTM1NzQsImRlcGFydG1lbnQiOiJJVCJ9.N5-bs1G0hEhj-YAF5WYH2yN3Eev7oECziXnBC2SPU3A', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '97'} body=b'{"record_type": "Controller", "activity_name": "Automated Data Collection", "purpose": "Testing"}'
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการสร้างรายการ RoPA ฝั่ง Controller

test.name: Verify Get All RoPA Controller Records

kw.name: GET On Session

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลรายการ RoPA Controller ทั้งหมด

test.name: Verify Create RoPA Processor Record

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'record_type': 'Processor', 'activity_name': 'Automated Processing', 'processor_name': 'Robot Corp'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzI...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/ropa/processor/create path_url=/api/v1/ropa/processor/create headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJHdXN0byIsInJvbGUiOiJkZXZlbG9wZXIiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImhhdHRha29ybjQ5QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInBob25lX251bWJlciI6IjA4MzAzMDI2NDkiLCJhZGRyZXNzIjoiVGhhbW1hc2F0IFVuaXZlcnNpdHkiLCJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxLCJleHAiOjE3NzcxNTM1NzQsImRlcGFydG1lbnQiOiJJVCJ9.N5-bs1G0hEhj-YAF5WYH2yN3Eev7oECziXnBC2SPU3A', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '101'} body=b'{"record_type": "Processor", "activity_name": "Automated Processing", "processor_name": "Robot Corp"}'
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการสร้างรายการ RoPA ฝั่ง Processor

test.name: Verify Get All RoPA Processor Records

kw.name: GET On Session

${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูล RoPA ที่รอการอนุมัติสำหรับ DPO

test.name: Verify DPO Approve Record

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/dpo/records/999/approve path_url=/api/v1/dpo/records/999/approve headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
${response} = <Response [401]>
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบ DPO กดอนุมัติรายการ RoPA

test.name: Verify Get Dashboard Summary

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://app:8000/api/v1/dashboard/summary path_url=/api/v1/dashboard/summary headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>

kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลภาพรวมสำหรับหน้า Dashboard
